admin_client_credentials_description: Save these credentials now. You will not be able to see the client secret again.
admin_client_secret_warning: Make sure you have copied the client secret before closing this dialog.
account_description: Manage your sign-in, organizations, and keys.
security_description: Protect your account with authenticator app verification.
two_factor_description: Use a time-based one-time password from your authenticator app.
two_factor_verify_description: Enter the code from your authenticator app to continue.
two_factor_verify_backup_description: Enter one of your backup codes to continue.
two_factor_scan_description: Add this account to your authenticator app, then enter the generated code below.
two_factor_backup_codes_warning: Save these backup codes now. They are shown only during setup.
organizations_description: Create and switch between organizations you belong to.
organization_create_description: Create a workspace for team-based access.
organization_slug_description: Leave blank to generate one from the name.
organizations_your_description: Set the active organization used by organization-aware features.
organizations_empty: You do not belong to any organizations yet.
api_keys_description: Create user-owned and organization-owned API keys.
api_keys_user_description: Keys owned by your user account.
api_keys_organization_description: Keys owned by the selected organization.
api_keys_no_organizations: Create or join an organization before creating organization API keys.
api_key_create_error: Could not create the API key.
api_key_delete_error: Could not delete the API key.
api_key_created_description: Copy this key now. You will not be able to see it again.
